author: codex

patch.value: Correct stale post-release documentation and runtime prerequisites

The release process and readiness guide still describe jellyfin-cli as unreleased and tell maintainers to keep the changelog in a first-release reset state despite published v2026.3.4 and v2026.3.6 releases. The dependency modernization also raises the supported runtime floor, which must be explicit in setup and contributor docs.
No active release documentation claims the project is pre-first-release.; Node and Bun prerequisites match CI and package metadata.; Session JSON and Toon playback fields are documented.
README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, docs/release-process.md, docs/release-readiness.md, docs/api.md, and docs/toon-format.md
Documentation reflects the current released lifecycle, Node 22.13 runtime floor, and sessions playback/output contract.
Release docs claim no public release exists and runtime/output changes are undocumented.
Maintainers can follow obsolete release instructions and users may install on unsupported Node versions or miss machine-readable playback behavior.

message: Track confirmed release and runtime documentation drift

value.author: codex
value.text: Updated Node/Bun prerequisites,session output docs,release lifecycle language,release readiness guidance,and Unreleased changelog.

author: codex

patch.value: All identified stale release/runtime statements were corrected and the child Toon contract issue is closed.
Maintainer and user docs reflect current runtime, output, and release state.
Documented Node 22.13 and Bun 1.3.11, corrected published-release lifecycle guidance, documented session playback formats, and updated the changelog.
Release and runtime documentation is current.

message: Close verified release documentation drift issue
